name: Global Social Media
description: Public-opinion simulation for a worldwide audience across time zones. Flattens the diurnal rhythm so activity never fully sleeps, suitable for international events rather than a single-region population.
prompt_framing: This is a global public-opinion simulation spanning multiple regions and time zones. Agents come from diverse cultural and linguistic backgrounds reacting to an international event. Model round-the-clock activity, cross-region disagreement, and how narratives travel between communities.
